name: Green Chili Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 cans whole kernel corn (16 oz each)
1 large can whole stewed tomatoes, lightly chopped
1 cup fresh green chili, or frozen, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger with chopped onions.
2. Add corn, stewed tomatoes (with juice), and green chili to the pan.
3. Pour in 2 cups of water. Season with garlic and salt to taste.
4. Cover and simmer for approximately 1 hour or longer if desired.
5. This stew is hearty and simple, perfect for a New Mexico-style meal.
